_comment: Source of truth for warrenlabs.com plugin landing pages. tools/gen_site.py renders web/<slug>/index.html + web/index.html from this. tools/new_plugin.sh appends an entry on scaffold. Fluency/foundation builds (e.g. Curve, Press codenames) are intentionally NOT listed — only shipping lane products get public pages. Names marked 'pending' are working names not yet vetted; pages are staging until the name locks.

plugins.name: Level
plugins.blurb: Flattens a headphone's measured response by inverting its curve, then adds Bauer-style crossfeed so a mix translates the way speakers would. The signal comes out measurably corrected — honest before anything else.

plugins.name: Square
plugins.blurb: Sums the bass to mono below a crossover, auditions the result, and shows you the stereo field — goniometer and correlation — so the low end holds up everywhere it's played.

plugins.name: Scribe
plugins.tagline: Scribe a tonal fit to target.
plugins.blurb: Learns a signal's tonal balance and gently pulls it toward a target curve — broad and musical, not surgical. The corrective half of the reference desk.

plugins.name: Reveal
plugins.tagline: Tame what rings, leave the rest.
plugins.blurb: A dense dynamic filterbank that cuts resonant bands only where and when they spike — transparent when nothing's ringing, minimum-phase, no pre-ringing. A delta monitor shows exactly what's removed.

plugins.name: Plane
plugins.blurb: The resonance engine scoped to the sibilance band — frequency-conscious de-essing that catches the specific harsh frequencies dynamically instead of ducking one static band.

plugins.name: Seat
plugins.blurb: Auditions your mix through voiced phone / earbuds / laptop / car colorations so you hear how the balance holds up elsewhere — a check tool, bypassed for the render.

plugins.name: Temper
plugins.blurb: Oversampled tube, tape, and transformer saturation with a bias control for asymmetry and a tone tilt. Warm at a touch, characterful when pushed — the first tool on the Character line.

plugins.name: Grind
plugins.blurb: Oversampled drive and distortion on the same engine as Temper, pushed hot: a diode-style overdrive, a crunchy cubic clip, and a compressed fuzz — with bias, tone, and dry/wet.

plugins.name: Burr
plugins.blurb: Extreme fuzz on the shared Saturator, pushed to the wall: a compressed near-square Fuzz, a hard-clipping Splat, and an asymmetric octave-y Buzz, with up to 60 dB of drive.

plugins.name: Ripple
plugins.blurb: A stereo modulated echo: feedback, an in-loop tone that darkens the repeats, wow/flutter, ping-pong, and Clean / Tape / BBD character. The first tool on the time corner.

plugins.name: Eddy
plugins.blurb: Chorus, flanger, and phaser on one engine: an LFO-modulated delay for chorus and flanger, a swept all-pass cascade for phaser, with rate, depth, feedback, and stereo width.

guides.title: Capturing your own reverb (impulse responses)
guides.summary: Sample the reverb of a real room — your studio, a hall — and load it into a convolution reverb.
